description: REQ-003 states EmptyNoteDiscarded is routed through the success channel and 'EmptyNoteDiscarded NEVER appears in the Err channel'. REQ-017 states 'The EmptyNoteDiscarded route is handled internally and does not appear in the top-level return type'. However, pipeline.ts lines 92-98 return the EmptyNoteDiscarded case as { ok: false, error: { kind: 'validation', reason: { kind: 'empty-body-on-idle' } } } -- an explicit Err with a SaveError. This directly violates both requirements. The comment at pipeline.ts line 91 even acknowledges this tension but chooses the wrong resolution.
